target_market_label.en: Australia (ACCC mandatory safety standards / AS/NZS ISO 8124)
target_market_label.zh: 澳大利亚（ACCC强制安全标准 / AS/NZS ISO 8124）
target_market_label.zht: 澳洲（ACCC強制安全標準 / AS/NZS ISO 8124）

title.zh: 中国玩具进入澳大利亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國玩具進入澳洲：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China toy compliance under GB 6675 / CCC against Australian Consumer Law mandatory safety standards, Product Safety Australia guidance, and the AS/NZS ISO 8124 toy safety series.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国GB 6675 / CCC玩具合规与澳大利亚消费者法强制安全标准、Product Safety Australia指南及AS/NZS ISO 8124玩具安全系列的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國GB 6675 / CCC玩具合規與澳洲消費者法強制安全標準、Product Safety Australia指引及AS/NZS ISO 8124玩具安全系列的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, ACCC determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Toy manufacturers, exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Australian Consumer Law instruments, mandatory safety standards, Product Safety Australia guidance, and AS/NZS ISO 8124 editions with qualified professionals before supplying products in Australia.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、ACCC裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。玩具制造商、出口商、进口商及经销商在澳大利亚供应产品前，应与合格专业人士核验现行澳大利亚消费者法文书、强制安全标准、Product Safety Australia指南及AS/NZS ISO 8124版本。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、ACCC裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。玩具製造商、出口商、進口商及經銷商在澳洲供應產品前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行澳洲消費者法文書、強制安全標準、Product Safety Australia指引及AS/NZS ISO 8124版本。

answer_first.en: Australia does not use a separate toy conformity mark comparable to the European marking route. The main China-to-Australia gaps are compliance with ACCC mandatory safety standards under Australian Consumer Law, small-parts and projectile requirements for toys intended for children up to and including 36 months, Australian warning and labelling practice, and evidence aligned to AS/NZS ISO 8124 rather than only GB 6675 / CCC.
answer_first.zh: 澳大利亚不采用类似欧洲标志路径的单独玩具符合性标志。中国玩具进入澳大利亚的主要差距在于：符合澳大利亚消费者法下ACCC强制安全标准；满足36个月及以下儿童玩具的小零件和弹射物要求；符合澳大利亚警示及标签做法；并提供与AS/NZS ISO 8124对齐的证据，而不能仅依赖GB 6675 / CCC。
answer_first.zht: 澳洲不採用類似歐洲標誌路徑的單獨玩具符合性標誌。中國玩具進入澳洲的主要差距在於：符合澳洲消費者法下ACCC強制安全標準；滿足36個月及以下兒童玩具的小零件和彈射物要求；符合澳洲警示及標籤做法；並提供與AS/NZS ISO 8124對齊的證據，而不能僅依賴GB 6675 / CCC。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
